_README: Typed port manifest per the Connection Standard (CONNECTORS.md). The composer wires two ports iff their `type` matches a name in the shared vocabulary (types.json). `name` is the literal wiring address: an input is read under state[name]; an output is written under output[name].

inputs.name: login
inputs.desc: Submitted email + plaintext code + the orchestrator-fetched outstanding stored code record + now.

outputs.name: session
outputs.desc: Issued authenticated session descriptor on accept; null on reject.

_proposed_types_note: LoginAttempt and Session are not yet in the orchestrator's types.json. Their proposed schemas are in types-proposed.json in this repo and described in the PR body for vocabulary review (CONNECTORS.md: new types are reviewed, not minted freely).
